description_long: This is a two-story wooden garage structure with a steeply pitched, metal gable roof. The front facade features a large, single-panel garage door at the base, flanked by vertical wooden planks in two contrasting tones. Above the garage door, there are two rectangular windows with gridded panes, set into a lighter wood section. The sides and rear of the building are clad in vertically aligned, weathered wooden boards, with the right side displaying two additional windows. The roof is a muted blue-gray color, extending slightly beyond the walls for added protection. The overall appearance suggests a rustic, utilitarian design suitable for residential or semi-rural urban environments.
description: A two-story wooden garage with a steep gable roof, large front garage door, and multiple windows, featuring weathered wood textures and a blue-gray metal roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large single-panel garage door, two upper windows, and contrasting wood textures.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the blue-gray metal gable roof and the rectangular footprint of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden wall with vertical planks and no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Side view with two small, gridded windows and continuous vertical wood paneling.
